title: Ladder Against a Wall
questionHtml: A ladder leans against a wall. The ladder is 10 feet long, and it makes a 30° angle with the ground. How high up the wall does the ladder reach?
instructionHtml: Use trigonometry to find the height. Identify the hypotenuse and the side opposite the 30° angle.
teacherNote: The answer and explanation will be posted on the Answer page after 2 days. Try solving the problem first before checking the answer.
